grouped_by_category.notes: ProductGroup extends ObservableCollection<Product>; CollectionView uses IsGrouped=True and ItemsSource bound to ObservableCollection<ProductGroup>

group_header_item_count.notes: GroupHeaderTemplate binds ItemCount (computed from Count) with badge Border

item_add_to_cart_button.notes: Button in ItemTemplate with Command and CommandParameter bindings

add_to_cart_fires_command.notes: AddToCartCommand is ICommand<Product> on ViewModel; RelativeSource AncestorType binding resolves correctly

pull_to_refresh.notes: RefreshView wraps CollectionView; Command=RefreshCommand; IsRefreshing two-way bound

empty_state_message.notes: VerticalStackLayout overlay controlled by IsEmpty binding with heading, subtext, and refresh button

issues.description: BoolToObjectConverter with TrueObject/FalseObject as string 'False'/'True' will not correctly drive IsVisible (a bool property). A proper InvertedBoolConverter returning bool is required. MAUI Community Toolkit provides one out of the box.
DisplayAlert called directly on Application.Current.MainPage inside ViewModel breaks MVVM purity. A dialog/navigation service abstraction is preferred.

Task.Run wrapping async LoadCatalogAsync in constructor can cause UI threading issues if ObservableCollection is modified off the main thread. Should use MainThread.BeginInvokeOnMainThread or equivalent.

score.notes: All required features are represented. One converter misuse will cause a runtime binding issue on IsVisible; fix is straightforward. Core grouped CollectionView pattern, pull-to-refresh wiring, and command binding are correct.
